entry.title: Part of That World
entry.summary:
Author: BobaTheBlackHole

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,320Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 60

Summary: “She was my world, Bruce… and you took her away from me.” Bruce loved Clark before he knew what to call it. He stayed close enough to protect him.Far enough to understand he would never be chosen. And when Bruce finally confessed, Clark’s answer was disgust. But love does not disappear just because it is unwanted. Sometimes, it survives the wound.Sometimes, it survives the ruins.Sometimes, it survives time itself. Even for the person who never wanted it back.

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 122,852Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 335

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.title: Phlebotomy
entry.summary:
Author: AroAceBasketCase

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,082Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Contains information from "Phlebotomy Essentials by Ruth. E. McCall, Eighth Edition." I'm taking Phlebotomy, so I needed to retain information, but I can only do that via fan fiction. So if you're reading this and you just started Phlebotomy as well and you're like "Huh, sounds like my class, I wonder who wrote it?" You never read this. You never saw the tags. Do not turn this into the 'I saw her at the devils sacrament!' 'girl what were YOU doing at the devils sacrament' Aight, now proceed. -----------------   Gotham Hero Hospital was a very dark place, a very over crowded place, and desperately needed more crew members to stop the chaos that runs inside. Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent find themselves both in a Phlebotomy Class together. Clark Kent, to go undercover and do an inside scoop. And Bruce Wayne, in order to make his public persona's idea of a hero FAR AWAY from actually vigilantism. But when Clark Kent starts to dodge getting blood drawn from his arm, Bruce Wayne starts to suspect there's something up with this farm boy from Kansas.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,120Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 85

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,135Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 450

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: the abyss gazes also
entry.summary:
Author: goddcoward

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,391Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 185

Summary: The gun fires twice. Blood and pearls fill the alleyway. The boy comes to a resolution. Years later in the mountains of Nepal, while honing his skills beneath the exacting gaze of Ra’s al Ghul, the boy comes to a crossroads. He makes his choice. The Batman never comes to be. The more things change, the more they stay the same.

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,648Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 186

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: sweet baby
entry.summary:
Author: Jja_Jjazza

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,851Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 132

Summary: The screen is still loading the second counterpart – the second contributor to the baby’s creation. “It must be Luthor,” Bruce says. “He’s the only one stupid enough to–” The screen loads. A match is confirmed. An image flickers up. “Oh, shit,” Tim gasps. Clark Kent, one side reads in big, bold letters, and beneath it shows Clark’s latest press profile photo. And on the other… Bruce Wayne. The image for Bruce is from a red carpet event. It’s flattering, boasting all his best features, from his thick, sharp eyebrows to the soft pink of his lips. - (Babies aren't always predicted. Sometimes they come as a surprise.)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Six Ways of Falling Apart
entry.summary:
Author: Lost_Girl_02

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,304Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 10

Summary: Only a few weeks after their escape from eight months of captivity, the Bats of Gotham have returned to Wayne Manor, closing ranks around themselves. Trauma manifests itself differently in every person, and that is no clearer than seeing how all six Waynes are reacting. Dick and Jason are going out every night (but not for patrol) while Tim and Cass are hiding themselves away, and Damian is pretending like he's fine. Bruce isn't sure how he'll be able to help his family when he's barely treading water himself, wondering if he's even helping or just making everyone worse. *** Or, 5 times Bruce couldn't help but worry about his kids + 1 time he lets others worry about him.

entry.title: Penumbra
entry.summary:
Author: Buukkin

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,958Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 18

Summary: Ultraman made it out of the black hole with only his last orders in mind: Kill Superman. He fails. He gets to know Clark. He gets to know himself. And when Clark really needs to go back to his life, he calls in a trusted friend to help the newly liberated clone find his footing in this world. Bruce Wayne just wants to keep a dangerous and unstable metahuman under control at first, but his guest proves to be surprisingly charming. Tags update as fic goes on, please check before reading.

entry.title: Pulled from the Snake Pit
entry.summary:
Author: Shadowwings204

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,475Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Ava is rescued from a sex trafficking ring by Batman, who places her in the care of Bruce Wayne and his sons. She seems to have caught a certain birdy's attention; albeit the suspicous kind. But before she can allow herself to love romantically, she struggles to understand what love truly is -- outside of lust. A relationship between her and Damian blossoms in aiding Ava find a sense of self and accepting her as she is. Or Batman rescues a victim of human experimentation that has resulted in turning her into a serpent-meta. Now she has a whole bunch of serpent-related issues and behaviors that she must learn to control or embrace with the help of a couple new boys in her life.

entry.title: They think Im crazy because of you
entry.summary:
Author: Mangojuiceeyy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 796Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: When Batman rises, becoming the Dark Knight who vows to bear Gotham's sins upon his shoulders, Lady Gotham awakens to him. She recognizes not merely a man in a cape, but a knight—her knight—one willing to bleed for a city that has never learned how to love gently. She offers him a precious gift, a companion, a friend, a guardian angel that guides the Caped Cruisader into the dark of the night, but also his daily life OR Batman has an 'invisble' friend that guides him in his decisions, a gift from by lady Gotham. The entity chooses who can see them and decided to stay hidden to (almost) everyone except the Dark Knight so now, everybody thinks Batman is crazy. With how often he talks to himself, it was to be expected.How do Batman's relationships evolve in this universe, where the Voice of Wisdom resides in his head?(he acts like a child at the beggining cuz I HAVE FREE WILL)

entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: synner (xsynnerx)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,059Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 88

Summary: “Yes, my… my soul hurt. I needed to see you. I… I'll shut up. I know you don't want to hear it.” Bruce hesitated before stepping closer. This just kept getting stranger. “I want to hear it now,” he urged. “I bare my soul to you,” Kal said finally, continuing to whisper. “I share my soul with you.” Or: Bruce accidentally bonds himself to a Kryptonian

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Don't Look Back
entry.summary:
Author: lovelytime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,808Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 85

Summary: Clark had died, and the world kept spinning. He wasn't quite sure where he fit now that he was back, but he knew better than to look back. Unfortunately, old habits die hard.
